title: Invalid JSON output from Edit Field2 node
symptom: The workflow fails to validate JSON output from the Edit Field2 node, displaying an error message indicating invalid JSON.
applies_when: Reading data from a text file
not_this_if: Data is manually entered into the Edit Field node
No error occurs when using the Code node
root_cause: The text file may contain unescaped control characters or formatting that is not compatible with JSON structure. This can include unescaped quotes, backslashes, or other special characters that disrupt JSON formatting.
fix_steps: Use a Code node to process the text and convert it to a valid JSON object using JSON.stringify()
Ensure all control characters are properly escaped, including backslashes and newlines
Test the output to confirm it validates as JSON
agent_instruction: Use a Code node to convert the text to valid JSON format.
